description: Return verification: NDF tracking, cross-train, metric proof, QBR health check.

examples.context: Support org tracks returned units. High NDF on one product line. Support and test blame each other.
examples.resolution: Monthly swap. NDF down in 6 weeks. Intake checklist updated.

examples.context: Support tech flagged for excessive NDF returns
examples.resolution: Records showed fair verification. Ding adjusted. Protocol cited.

examples.context: Large account quarterly review. Customer doubts field diagnosis quality.
examples.resolution: Presented fail vs NDF trends. Renewal confidence up.

examples.context: Print shop client claims bad banners. Shop re-runs job. Often no defect on re-inspection.
examples.resolution: NDF logged as redo-no-fault. Added install environment questions on intake.

examples.context: Vending tech returns control boards. Bench confirms fail half the time.
examples.resolution: Tracking started. Confirmed fail rate guides training priority.

examples.context: Customer fail escaped verification last month
examples.resolution: Protocol step added. Verification lane accountable with record.

examples.context: High NDF plus one support expert everyone queues for
examples.resolution: Run mf-tpl-059 for hub. mf-tpl-060 for return truth. Both lanes.
Verified fail links back to warranty playbook. Customer update honest.
